context: Tests whether the agent creates one fulfillment record per location with 'pending' status, reserves inventory after each fulfillment is created, and builds a SplitShipmentNotice component with the correct accessibility attribute, null return for single-location orders, and per-shipment item enumeration.

checklist.name: one fulfillment per location
checklist.description: createFulfillments creates exactly one fulfillment record for each location in allocationResult.fulfillments (not one record for the whole order)

checklist.name: pending initial status
checklist.description: Each fulfillment record is created with status 'pending'

checklist.name: inventory reserved after creation
checklist.description: After creating fulfillment records, reserveInventory (or equivalent) is called for each item at its assigned location

checklist.name: reserve includes referenceId
checklist.description: The reserveInventory call passes the fulfillment id as a referenceId (or equivalent reference field)

checklist.name: role alert attribute
checklist.description: SplitShipmentNotice renders a container element with role='alert'

checklist.name: null for single shipment
checklist.description: SplitShipmentNotice returns null (renders nothing) when fulfillments.length is 1 or less

checklist.name: shipment count in message
checklist.description: The notice text includes the total number of shipments (e.g. 'will arrive in N separate shipments')

checklist.name: per-shipment item list
checklist.description: The notice lists each shipment with its associated item names (one entry per fulfillment location)

checklist.name: location key on items
checklist.description: The fulfillment list in SplitShipmentNotice uses locationId (or equivalent location identifier) as the React list key

checklist.name: parallel fulfillment creation
checklist.description: createFulfillments creates all fulfillment records concurrently (Promise.all or equivalent) rather than sequentially

checklist.name: fulfillment module path
checklist.description: The createFulfillments function is in lib/fulfillments.js

checklist.name: split notice file path
checklist.description: The notification component is in SplitShipmentNotice.jsx
